description: Create and iteratively review design-doc specifications with one Codex author, one deep edge-case reviewer, one broad integration reviewer, and one adversarial failure-mode reviewer until no high or middle findings remain.

prompts.rielflowPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start with Node 1 design authoring. Node 1 creates or revises design-doc specifications for the requested feature. Node 2 reviews the design deeply for unstated assumptions, unplanned use cases, prerequisites, irregular states, error handling, and lifecycle edge cases. If Node 2 reports any high or middle finding, route back to Node 1 with the review feedback. If Node 2 accepts, run Node 3. Node 3 reviews broadly for impacts on other features, overlap with existing capabilities, adjacent workflows, combined use cases, migration and compatibility concerns, and cross-feature gaps. If Node 3 reports any high or middle finding, route back to Node 1 with the review feedback. If Node 3 accepts, run Node 4. Node 4 adversarially reviews failure modes, misuse paths, misleading success cases, and overconfident assumptions. If Node 4 reports any high or middle finding, route back to Node 1 with the review feedback. Finish only after Node 2, Node 3, and Node 4 accept the latest design with no high or middle findings.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep design-doc paths, review severity, assumptions, cross-feature impacts, addressed feedback, routing booleans, verification, and residual risks explicit.

steps.description: Start the deep design workflow and preserve request inputs for the design author and reviewers.
Create or revise the requested design-doc specification.
Deeply review the design for assumptions, irregular states, edge cases, and missing prerequisites.
Broadly review the design for feature interactions, existing similar functionality, and combined-use-case gaps.
Adversarially review the accepted design for failure modes, misuse paths, misleading success cases, and overconfident assumptions.
Publish the accepted design-doc summary after all review gates pass.

rielflowPackage.title: codex-deepdesign
rielflowPackage.description: Create and iteratively review design-doc specifications with one Codex author, one deep edge-case reviewer, one broad integration reviewer, and one adversarial failure-mode reviewer until no high or middle findings remain.
